overview.Name: Arteris Inc
overview.Description: Arteris Inc. (AIP) is a leading innovator in the semiconductor sector, specializing in interconnect IP solutions that are vital for the design of system-on-chip (SoC) architectures. By streamlining communication between chips, Arteris significantly enhances data processing performance, catering to an expansive clientele in the rapidly evolving electronics market. The company boasts a robust product portfolio and prioritizes innovation, positioning itself to meet the rising complexity and performance expectations of next-generation chip designs. Through strategic partnerships, Arteris strengthens its competitive footprint, presenting considerable opportunities for sustained growth within the dynamic semiconductor industry.
overview.Address: 900 E. HAMILTON AVENUE, CAMPBELL, CA, UNITED STATES, 95008
